remaining_work.notes: Dependabot PRs show unstable merge state but this is due to notification failures only, not actual code issues. All issues are already labeled. All pipeline failures are infrastructure/external.

notes: All 8 failing repos confirmed as non-actionable infrastructure/external issues
Both dependabot PRs are mergeable but show unstable state due to notification failures
All 15 open issues already have appropriate labels and triage
No code-level fixes needed - all failures are infrastructure
4 repos have no workflows but these appear to be archive/config repos
Ecosystem is in optimal state with no actionable maintenance work
- Add TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID to aa-dev-prod-watcher repo settings
- Investigate dependabot dynamic event failures on 4 repos
- Consider forking or replacing mikeal/publish-to-github-action for pass-gnome-extension
- External API failures (Gnome, Chrome) are transient and not fixable at code level
